name: deal-intel-mcp
description: Turn meeting notes into MEDDPICC-structured deal intelligence. 5 MCP tools, MongoDB Atlas storage, Claude or ChatGPT LLM backend.
long_description: deal-intel-mcp captures consultation records and meeting notes, extracts MEDDPICC qualification signals via LLM, and stores them in MongoDB Atlas. Tools: create_deal (new deal), add_meeting (notes → MEDDPICC extraction), get_deal (full history), list_deals (stage filter), analyze_deal (BD strategy generation). Supports Anthropic Claude or ChatGPT Plus OAuth as LLM backends. Sibling project to event-intel-mcp (prospect discovery at exhibitions).

tools.name: create_deal
tools.description: Create a new deal for a prospect company.

tools.name: add_meeting
tools.description: Add meeting notes to a deal and auto-extract MEDDPICC signals via LLM.

tools.name: get_deal
tools.description: Retrieve a deal with full meeting history and MEDDPICC scores.

tools.name: list_deals
tools.description: List deals, optionally filtered by stage.

tools.name: analyze_deal
tools.description: Analyze MEDDPICC gaps and generate BD strategy recommendations.

python_path.title: Python interpreter path
python_path.description: Path to the Python interpreter where deal-intel-mcp deps are installed (must have run `pip install -e .` against the repo). The default assumes the event-intel conda env — adjust if you created a separate deal-intel env.

mongodb_uri.title: MongoDB Atlas URI
mongodb_uri.description: Connection string for your MongoDB Atlas cluster (M0 free tier works). Format: mongodb+srv://<user>:<password>@<cluster>.mongodb.net/?retryWrites=true&w=majority

use_chatgpt_oauth.title: Use ChatGPT Plus/Pro subscription instead of an Anthropic API key
use_chatgpt_oauth.description: Check this to drive the LLM with your ChatGPT subscription (OAuth, no extra cost) instead of an Anthropic API key. After installing, run `deal-intel login-chatgpt` once in a terminal to authenticate. Leave unchecked to use the Anthropic API key below.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API key
anthropic_api_key.description: For the Anthropic path. Leave blank if you checked 'Use ChatGPT' above, or to supply it via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in the repo's .env instead.
